mismatch_triage.justification: A_value and B_value are incompatible due to different hardware specifications.
The descriptions are semantically similar and cover overlapping domains.
The keywords are related and cover overlapping domains.
The purposes are semantically similar and cover overlapping domains.
A_value and B_value are incompatible due to different software specifications.

mismatches.why_it_blocks_integration: The hardware specifications are incompatible, which can lead to performance issues or failures in integration.
mismatches.proposed_fix: Standardize the hardware specifications to ensure compatibility.

rules: Standardize hardware specifications to a common set.
data_transform.example: Both models should use the same hardware specifications.

steps: Update both models to use the common hardware specifications.

validation: Verify that both models can run on the common hardware specifications.

mismatches.why_it_blocks_integration: The software specifications are incompatible, which can lead to integration issues or failures.
mismatches.proposed_fix: Standardize the software specifications to ensure compatibility.

rules: Standardize software specifications to a common set.
data_transform.example: Both models should use the same software specifications.

steps: Update both models to use the common software specifications.

validation: Verify that both models can run on the common software specifications.
